summary: A clip from a KCRA segment with a LIVE label and a BREAKING NEWS banner. It shows aerial footage of a highway where a tan sedan sits with its doors open and several people stand beside it on the roadway and shoulder. A location label reads an exit near Patterson, CA. The lower-third reads SHOOTING INVOLVING ICE AGENTS IN STANISLAUS COUNTY.

script.scene: Aerial footage frames a stretch of highway; location label reads an exit near Patterson, CA; lower-third reads SHOOTING INVOLVING ICE AGENTS IN STANISLAUS COUNTY.
Aerial footage shows a tan sedan with its doors open and several people standing beside it on the roadway.
Continued aerial footage of the scene; the BREAKING NEWS banner remains.
